name: My back hurt before the warehouse accident - will pre-existing condition kill my claim?
description: No, covers aggravation; get doctor to link it.[3]

mainEntity.name: My back hurt before the warehouse accident - will pre-existing condition kill my claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, covers aggravation; get doctor to link it.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: **No, if the accident aggravated it, workers' comp covers the worsening; prove via medical opinion.** Prior issues don't bar benefits if new injury occurred.[3][5] Key factors: doctor links aggravation to work event; avoid 'symptom magnification' accusations. Get independent exam if disputed; document baseline vs. post-injury. Aggravation claims often win.[3]
